summary: v111 adds `boundedHomotopyExactWeakEquivalence_eq_boundedExactAcyclicHomotopy_trW_inverseImage` and `boundedExactWeakEquivalence_eq_boundedExactAcyclicHomotopy_trW_inverseImage_of_isoClosed`, aligning the homotopy/Verdier pullback weak equivalences, and under exact-acyclic iso-closedness the direct bounded weak equivalences, with the bounded homotopy Verdier `trW` inverse image under the lifted bounded homotopy quotient. Product remains nonterminal because bounded/exact-acyclic closed2 is not unconditional, direct bounded left/right calculus and triangulated transfer to Dbounded are not proved, and no stable infinity-category structure is constructed.
